sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - HARTMANN [III] (-31 Aug 1180).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hartman III von Dillingen於1138年出生在德國薩阿藍德藍德可萊斯 薩爾路易迪林根時，他的父親Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen11135歲，母親Ermentrude von Morsberg30歲。他和Richenza von Lenzburg至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1180年8月31日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hartman III von Dillingen于1138年出生在德国薩阿藍德藍德可萊斯 薩爾路易迪林根时，他的父亲Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen11135岁，母亲Ermentrude von Morsberg30岁。他和Richenza von Lenzburg至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1180年8月31日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dillingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Dillingen near Augsburg or Tüllingen in Baden.

English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Drellingore in Kent, recorded as Dillynger in 1264, from the Old English personal name Dylla + -ing-, denoting association, + Old English ōra ‘hill slope’.

nameMeanings.name: Hartman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hard ‘strong, hardy’ + man ‘man’. The Blessed Hartmann ( d. 1164 ) enjoyed a cult in Austria. Hartmann von Aue ( c.1170– c.1220 ) was an influential writer of chivalric romances.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hartman III von Dillingen was born in 1138, in Dillingen, Saarlouis, Saarland, Germany, his father, Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen, was 11135 and his mother, Ermentrude von Morsberg, was 30. He had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Richenza von Lenzburg. He died on 31 August 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.Dillingen, Germany: Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.Kyburg-Dillingen, Germany: Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hartman III von Dillingen est né en 1138, à Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, La Sarre, Allemagne, son père, Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen, avait 11135 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude von Morsberg, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Richenza von Lenzburg. Il est décédé le 31 août 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hartman III von Dillingen 1138 in Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, Saarland, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen 11135 und seine Mutter Ermentrude von Morsberg 30. Er hatte mit Richenza von Lenzburg mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 31. August 1180 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hartman III von Dillingen è nato il nel 1138 nel Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, Saarland, Germania, il suo padre, Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen, aveva 11135 anni e il suo madre, Ermentrude von Morsberg, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Richenza von Lenzburg. Morì il 31 agosto 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hartman III von Dillingenが1138年にドイツサアルランドランドクレイス サアルロウイスデリンジェンで生まれた時，父Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingenは11135歳，母Ermentrude von Morsbergは30歳であった。彼はRichenza von Lenzburgとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1180年8月31日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hartman III von Dillingen(이)가 1138년 독일 사알랜드 랜드크레이스 사알루이스 딜링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen(은)는 11135세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermentrude von Morsberg(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Richenza von Lenzburg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 8월 31일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hartman III von Dillingen nasceu em 1138, em Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, Saarland, Alemanha, seu pai, Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen, tinha 11135 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude von Morsberg, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Richenza von Lenzburg. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hartman III von Dillingen родился в 1138 г. в местности диллинген, ландкрис саарлуиз, саарланд, Германия, его отцу по имени Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen было 11135 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude von Morsberg, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Richenza von Lenzburg. Он умер 31 августа 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hartman III von Dillingen nació en 1138, en Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, Saarland, Alemania, su papá, Adalbert I von Kyburg Dillingen, tenía 11135 años y su mamá, Ermentrude von Morsberg, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Richenza von Lenzburg. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
